description_long: This is a futuristic, compact airplane with a sleek, angular fuselage and a predominantly white and gray color scheme accented by black and blue details. The aircraft features two large, cylindrical engines mounted on short pylons extending from the wings, with visible turbine details at the rear. The wings are straight and mid-mounted, with a slight anhedral angle and no visible winglets, giving the airplane a robust and agile appearance. The cockpit is forward-mounted, enclosed with a blue-tinted canopy, and appears to be designed for a single pilot. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers, forming a conventional tail configuration. Retractable tricycle landing gear is visible beneath the fuselage, indicating the airplane is designed for ground operations as well as flight.
description: A compact, futuristic airplane with twin cylindrical engines, a forward-enclosed cockpit, and a conventional tail. The design features straight mid-mounted wings and a white-gray color scheme with black and blue accents.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angular fuselage, forward cockpit, and one engine mounted on a short pylon beneath the wing.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the twin cylindrical engines, blue-tinted cockpit canopy, and the straight, mid-mounted wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other engine, the detailed landing gear, and the full length of the fuselage.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the engine exhausts, single vertical stabilizer, and the horizontal stabilizers of the tail.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings and a slight anhedral angle; no winglets or variable geometry features visible.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted on short pylons beneath each wing.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with one nose gear and two main gear units.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single-seat configuration and a blue-tinted canopy.
